brand.name: typo
page.downloads.title: Download typo
page.downloads.description: Get the latest version of typo for your system and start refining your text with AI instantly.
page.downloads.heading: Get the Latest Version
page.downloads.p: Choose the version for your platform and experience AI-powered text refinement. Let your ideas flow freely and your expression reach its full potential.
page.downloads.platform.detecting: Detecting the best version for you...
page.home.title: typo — AI text refinement for your desktop
hero.title: Elevate Your Expression with Instant AI Refinement
hero.description: typo is a revolutionary AI desktop assistant that’s always ready wherever you write. Select any text, press a shortcut, and watch as intelligent suggestions seamlessly replace the original—making every word count.
hero.video_fallback: Your browser does not support embedded video. See the intro in the project README on GitHub.
hero.video_caption: Quick intro — same clip as in the README
features.title: Minimalist Design, Maximum Efficiency
features.description: typo stays out of your way until the moment you need it — effortlessly capturing your selection, processing it with AI, and pasting the refined result back into your workflow.
features.items.multi_model.title: Multi-model Engine
features.items.multi_model.body: Full support for DeepSeek and local Ollama models. Seamlessly switch between cloud and on-device AI based on your needs.
features.items.hotkeys.title: Global Hotkeys
features.items.hotkeys.body: Instant activation with Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + X (with custom shortcut support for systems like Wayland).
features.items.pasting.title: Native Seamless Pasting
features.items.pasting.body: Clipboard-based replacement for maximum compatibility across all major apps and input methods.
features.items.customizable.title: Highly Tailorable
features.items.customizable.body: Refine AI behavior via system prompts and five dedicated prompt shortcuts to match your unique writing style.
testimonials.title: Voices from Our Community
testimonials.description: Hear what our early testers and alpha users have to say. {download} to experience it yourself, or read the {docs} to learn more.
testimonials.quote.yuler: I currently use Typo to improve my English grammar, and I wanted to share it with you.
testimonials.role.creator: Creator of typo
testimonials.quote.jianwu: I'm learning Japanese now, and I think this tool can help people like us who want to learn a foreign language.
testimonials.quote.gonghui: Amazing tool, I love this tiny thing.

page.docs.heading: Documentation
page.docs.p: Install typo, learn the workflow, prompt shortcuts, and platform-specific notes. Use the sidebar to move between pages.
